An attacker in a man-in-the-middle position between bbot and a Docker registry could modify this header to redirect the authentication request to an arbitrary endpoint, potentially leaking authentication tokens.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00167, "percentile": 0.06233}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:25Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-12566"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T23:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:25Z", "references": ["https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security/advisories/GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12566", "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/commit/c2f4bc0f4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/blacklanternsecurity/bbot/security-advisories/GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/blacklanternsecurity/bbot", "summary": "BBOT: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in docker_pull module via WWW-Authenticate realm parsing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T15:03:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3mp7-vp6j-2mxx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.8.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "bbot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, <= 2.8.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: BBOT: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in docker_pull module via WWW-Authenticate realm parsing
